prompt: A warm, painterly anime illustration in a Studio Ghibli-inspired style, showing a young man sitting shirtless on a dark green wooden bench in front of the Palais Garnier opera house in Paris. He wears only navy blue drawstring shorts, has a slim athletic build, lightly tousled dark brown hair, and a relaxed, casual pose with one arm stretched along the bench backrest and the other hand delicately holding a lit cigarette near his mouth. His legs are apart in a natural seated posture, and thin wisps of smoke rise in the sunlit air. The background is a detailed frontal view of the Opéra Garnier, rendered with ornate Beaux-Arts architecture, tall columns, sculpted figures, gilded rooftop statues, a green oxidized copper dome, and two visible flags on the roof: the French flag and the European Union flag. In the left foreground, include 1 large black ornate lamppost and 1 blue Paris street sign reading RUE SCRIBE 9e ARR.. Add a stone balustrade between the bench and the street, a small crowd of pedestrians near the opera entrance, and 1 dark car on the road. Use bright afternoon sunlight, soft blue sky, fluffy white clouds, cinematic composition, hand-painted textures, nostalgic cel-animation color grading, and a serene, romantic European summer atmosphere.
